node.text: Caroline acknowledged the traumatic experience of Melanie's family being in an accident during the road trip.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "feel after accident") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: Caroline went hiking last week and got into a bad spot with some people but tried to apologize.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "feel after accident") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.92)

node.text: Caroline's relationships have changed due to her journey, some friends were not able to handle the changes.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "feel after accident") on Observation 6 (Score: 0.62)

node.text: Caroline used to go horseback riding with her dad when she was a kid.
Caroline has a guinea pig named Oscar.
The support group has made Caroline feel accepted and given her courage to embrace herself.
Caroline is planning to continue her education and explore career options in counseling or mental health to support those with similar issues.
Caroline has been creating art since the age of 17.
Caroline appreciates seeing Melanie's love for her family and acknowledges that they are her rock.
Caroline transitioned and joined the transgender community seeking acceptance and support.
